creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 251618
251287: Attempt to update Cura to 5.7.0 (v3: fix libcharon python version, some wrong variable substitutions in cura pkg-plist)

Here's the complete patchset successfully build with Python 3.11.

There were some issues in Cura's pkg-plist due to filenames with 310 in their name being substituted to %%PYTHON_VERSION%% which then wasn't 310.
